prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical streetwear brand launch poster for GORDENINDUSTRY, using a bold editorial collage style with product mockups, handwritten orange annotations, and high-contrast black, white, gray, and vivid orange branding.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 poster, off-white paper background with subtle grain and faint texture. Center the composition with generous margins and a modern fashion lookbook aesthetic.

Typography: At the top, place one huge condensed uppercase black headline reading “GORDENINDUSTRY”, spanning nearly the full width. Above it add one thin rough black horizontal scribble line. Use tall heavy sans-serif type for brand text. Use orange handwritten script for the slogan Gorden Yeah! across the lower middle.

Layout and discrete elements: Include exactly 7 main collage objects: 1 folded black sweatshirt on the left with small orange “GORDENINDUSTRY” text; 1 grayscale cutout walking model in a black hoodie and loose pants at center, face obscured or simplified; 1 Polaroid-style photo of folded blue jeans in the upper right; 1 white canvas tote bag in the lower center with black “GORDENINDUSTRY” text; 1 translucent plastic garment pouch in the lower left containing a folded light sweatshirt and a small hanging tag; 1 dark gray product box on the right with an orange band labeled “FW / 26” and a small barcode sticker; 1 tall bright orange shopping bag at the lower right with thin orange handles.

Graphic marks and text details: Behind the central objects, add one irregular vivid orange paint-blob shape. Add exactly 2 stamp/label graphics: a rounded rectangle label reading “NEW DROP” with smaller text “SHOP / LOOKBOOK / ABOUT”, and a circular black stamp reading “EST. 2019”. Add exactly 2 starburst doodles: one small orange starburst near the sweatshirt and one larger orange burst near the jeans containing the word FRESH. Add exactly 8 hand-drawn orange arrows or curved directional marks around the collage, pointing between products. Add exactly 3 small white/orange asterisk sparkle marks.

Style: Contemporary urban fashion advertising, magazine cut-and-paste collage, realistic product photography mixed with paper cutouts, slight drop shadows, imperfect edges, energetic hand-drawn orange marker lines, clean negative space, premium but playful streetwear branding.

Constraints: Keep all visible text in English and spelled clearly. Do not add extra products beyond the 7 listed main objects. Avoid photorealistic faces; keep the model face hidden or indistinct. No logos other than the brand name, no watermark, no borders.
